title: Xtra Dense Brazilian Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Brazilian chicken stew made with apple juice and caramelized onions, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and low in sodium to suit various dietary needs.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the apple juice, dried thyme, salt-free seasoning blend, and black pepper to the pot, stirring to combine.
Add the diced tomatoes and chicken broth to the pot, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
